task_objective: Strengthen test suite based on review findings for the event-loop-blocking RPCs fixes.
design_decisions: Rewrote test_log_rpc_before_service_construction (Finding F1) because the previous version was vacuous; it overrode the _service accessor in a way that never set the _backend attribute, meaning the test would erroneously pass even if the code regressed to calling the service synchronously. The new test strictly asserts the fallback behavior using the real class structure.

Added a 5-second timeout bound to the event.wait() call in test_is_game_cache_current_does_not_block_event_loop (Finding F2) because the project lacks a pytest-timeout plugin. Without this bound, if the handler regresses to running on the event loop, pytest would hang forever instead of producing a clean failure.
results: Successfully implemented all 4 review findings (2 required, 2 optional) strictly within the test code. The main logic files and vendored libraries were untouched as prescribed. The test suite, including typing and formatting checks, passed completely.
